banner.title: SuiLoop is open-source software, not a financial service.
banner.body: Non-custodial. No KYC. High risk — only use funds you can afford to lose.

hero.description: Institutional-grade autonomous AI agents that execute flash loans, arbitrage, and yield strategies — with mathematical safety enforced by Sui Move smart contracts.

nonCustodial.title: Non-Custodial Vaults
nonCustodial.description: Your funds are held in on-chain Vault objects. The agent can execute strategies, but only you can withdraw — enforced by immutable Move bytecode.

flashLoans.title: Hot Potato Flash Loans
flashLoans.description: Borrowed capital must be repaid in the same Programmable Transaction Block or it reverts atomically. Zero risk of debt, zero collateral required.

agents.title: Autonomous AI Agents
agents.description: Deploy named agents (TITAN, ELIZA, WHALE) with on-chain ELO reputation. Each agent has a strategy profile, risk tolerance, and verifiable track record.

verified.title: Move Prover Verified
verified.description: Smart contracts are formally verified with the Move Prover. Solvency invariants are mathematically proven, not just tested.

cta.title: Ready to Deploy?
cta.description: Connect your Sui wallet and deploy your first autonomous agent in minutes.

quickStart.title: Quick Start (One-Liner)
quickStart.desc: Works on macOS, Windows & Linux. The one-liner installs dependencies and sets up the TypeScript/Python environment.

companion.title: Native Desktop Terminal
companion.desc: Professional desktop environment. Native performance for high-frequency monitoring and direct process control.

executive.title: Executive Summary
executive.p1: SuiLoop is an institutional-grade DeFi protocol on the Sui blockchain that integrates
executive.p2: The protocol leverages Move 2024's linear type system (Hot Potato Pattern) to guarantee flash loan repayment at the compiler level, while ElizaOS powers intelligent off-chain agents that analyze market conditions and orchestrate transactions via Programmable Transaction Blocks (PTB).

progressive.title: Progressive Automation
progressive.desc: SuiLoop solves the biggest AI-Crypto dilemma:

analyst.title: The Analyst
analyst.desc: Deciphers the Matrix. Scans liquidity dislocations and cross-protocol spreads with superhuman speed.

executioner.title: The Executioner
executioner.desc: Routes capital through the optimal Neural Path. Atomic swaps on Cetus and instant flash repayments.

validator.title: The Validator
validator.desc: Ensures every trade maintains your ELO Reputation. Simulates outcomes to protect your record in the Neural Matrix.

architecture.title: THE
architecture.subtitle: NEURAL MATRIX
architecture.p: Built on 4 pillars: Neural Control Hub (NASA), The Iron Man Suit (Neural Kernel), The Hot Potato (Atomic Engine), and The Neural Forensic Log (Walrus).

f1.title: Visual Strategy Builder
f1.desc: Drag-and-drop node editor for custom strategies

f3.title: Strategy Marketplace
f3.desc: 16+ pre-built strategies ready to deploy. SUI & USDC asset selector on each.

f4.title: The Hot Potato (Execution)
f4.desc: Implements a 10-second 'Hot Potato' pattern. Borrow millions in flash liquidity; if the arb fails to repay, the timeline is 'rewound' as if nothing happened.

f5.title: Neural Matrix (The Suit)
f5.desc: The J.A.R.V.I.S. of DeFi. Inject new trading strategies into the pilot's helmet in mid-flight (hot-swapping) without ever powering down.

f6.title: Forensic Black Box (Walrus)
f6.desc: Decentralized flight recorder. Every decision is written in digital stone on the Walrus Protocol. Indestructible and absolute proof of activity.

f7.title: Mission Control Voice
f7.desc: Command your agents via vocal field radio. Integrated STT/TTS modules allow operators to receive audio status reports in the heat of battle.

f8.title: Self-Healing Gateway
f8.desc: Automated diagnostics via CLI. Monitoring network health and gas levels with auto-pause functionality for maximum operational safety.

f9.title: AI Failover Core 2.0
f9.desc: Multi-provider architecture (OpenAI -> Anthropic -> Bedrock) ensures 99.99% uptime for the agent's decision-making logic.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: March 5, 2026 · Effective upon use of the Protocol

warning.title: High Risk Disclosure
warning.body: DeFi strategies carry significant financial risk including total loss of deposited funds. SuiLoop is a software tool, not an investment service. You interact with blockchain smart contracts directly — no entity can reverse on-chain transactions. Only use funds you can afford to lose entirely.

sections.title: 1. Nature of the Service — Software Tool Only
sections.content:
SuiLoop ("the Protocol," "the Software," "the Platform") is an open-source software infrastructure project. It provides users with tools to interact autonomously with public blockchain networks (specifically the Sui Network).

SuiLoop is NOT and does NOT operate as:
• A financial institution, bank, broker-dealer, or investment adviser.
• An Institution of Financial Technology (ITF) under Mexico's Ley para Regular las Instituciones de Tecnología Financiera (LRITF, 2018, as amended through November 14, 2025).
• An Institution of Collective Financing (IFC / crowdfunding platform).
• An Institution of Electronic Payment Funds (IFPE / digital wallet).
• An exchange, custodian, or intermediary of virtual assets under any applicable law.
• A regulated financial product or service provider in any jurisdiction.

The Protocol provides software interfaces that allow users to create and manage their own on-chain Vault objects on the Sui blockchain. No funds are held, managed, or controlled by SuiLoop or its operators at any time.

sections.title: 2. Non-Custodial Architecture — No Custodial Access
sections.content:
SuiLoop is architecturally non-custodial by design:

• Private Keys: SuiLoop does not request, store, transmit, or have access to users' private keys or seed phrases at any point.
• Funds: User funds are held exclusively in smart contract Vault objects on the Sui blockchain. These Vaults are owned and controlled solely by the user's wallet address (OwnerCap). SuiLoop operators cannot access, withdraw, freeze, or otherwise control these funds.
• Agent Capabilities (AgentCap): Delegation of trading execution via AgentCap is limited exclusively to executing pre-defined, whitelisted smart contract functions. No AgentCap grants withdrawal rights, transfer rights, or custodial access to user funds.
• Hot Potato Pattern: All flash loan operations are atomic. If a strategy does not complete profitably within a single Programmable Transaction Block (PTB), the entire transaction reverts automatically. No debt is created, no funds are lost.

Users remain sole custodians of their assets at all times.

sections.title: 3. Risk Disclosure — High Risk DeFi Activity
sections.content:
IMPORTANT: Interacting with decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols involves significant financial risks. By using SuiLoop, you acknowledge and accept the following risks:

• Smart Contract Risk: Despite formal verification via the Move Prover, smart contracts may contain unforeseen bugs or vulnerabilities.
• Market Risk: Flash loan strategies depend on market conditions. Unprofitable market conditions will cause strategy transactions to revert.
• Oracle Risk: Price data from Pyth Network and other oracles may be stale, manipulated, or incorrect.
• Protocol Risk: Third-party DeFi protocols (Scallop, Cetus, Navi, DeepBook) used by SuiLoop strategies may be paused, exploited, or may change their interfaces without notice.

PAST PERFORMANCE OF SIMULATED OR HISTORICAL STRATEGIES IS NOT INDICATIVE OF FUTURE RESULTS.

sections.title: 4. AI & LLM Volatility Risk (Algorithmic Hallucination)
sections.content: The Neural Swarm utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs, including but not limited to OpenAI and Ollama) to parse DeFi market data, execute Python/TypeScript skills, and construct Move Programmable Transaction Blocks (PTBs). AI models are highly experimental, non-deterministic, and prone to "hallucinations," API rate limits, and latency spikes. SuiLoop does not guarantee the logical accuracy, timing, or success of any AI-generated signal or execution. Users explicitly accept the risk of algorithmic misfires or third-party AI provider outages.

sections.title: 5. No Yield, APY, or Return Guarantees
sections.content: Any references to APY (Annual Percentage Yield), ROI, or historical profitability from third-party protocols (e.g., Scallop, Navi, DeepBook) displayed on the Protocol's interfaces are strictly for informational and retroactive analytical purposes. They do NOT represent a promise, forecast, or guarantee of future returns. SuiLoop is not a bank and does not capture public resources to generate fixed or variable yields.

sections.title: 6. Regulatory Compliance & Jurisdictional Restrictions
sections.content:
Mexico (Specific Disclosure): SuiLoop operates as a software tool provider. It does not perform activities regulated under the Ley Fintech (LRITF), Ley del Mercado de Valores, or Ley de Instituciones de Crédito. Users are responsible for independently assessing their obligations under the Ley Federal para la Prevención e Identificación de Operaciones con Recursos de Procedencia Ilícita (LFPIORPI).

Restricted Persons: The Protocol is not available to persons or entities subject to sanctions by OFAC, the UN Security Council, or other applicable sanctions authorities.

No Financial Advice: Nothing contained in the SuiLoop Protocol, its documentation, or communications from its operators constitutes financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property & Open Source License
sections.content:
The SuiLoop Protocol software is released under the MIT License. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Eras256/Sui-Loop.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS," WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NONINFRINGEMENT.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, SuiLoop, its operators, contributors, and affiliates shall not be liable for any loss of funds resulting from smart contract exploits, market conditions, user error, or third-party protocol failures. SuiLoop's total cumulative liability to any user shall not exceed the deployment fees paid by that user in the thirty (30) days immediately preceding the event.

sections.title: 9. Dispute Resolution, Governing Law & Class Action Waiver
sections.content: Any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or relating to your use of the Protocol or these Terms shall be settled by binding, confidential arbitration, rather than in court. You explicitly waive your right to participate in any class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration against SuiLoop, its operators, or contributors. These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Mexico (Estado de México), Mexico, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

legalModal.title: CRITICAL: Risk Acknowledgment
legalModal.subtitle: Institutional Compliance Protocol
legalModal.description: Access to the Neural Swarm Engine requires cryptographic confirmation of our legal framework.

items.label: Non-Custodial
items.desc: Software infrastructure, no custodial access to your funds.

items.label: AI Volatility
items.desc: Agents can fail due to LLM non-determinism or API spikes.

items.label: Atomic Loss
items.desc: Exposure to flash loans carries risk of 100% capital loss.

items.label: Jurisdiction
items.desc: Governed by Estado de México (MX) laws. Class-action waiver.

legalModal.footer: Full documentation & terms available for review:
legalModal.signMessage: I have read and accept the SuiLoop Terms of Service, Risk Disclosures, and explicitly acknowledge the risk of total fund loss and AI algorithmic hallucinations. I confirm I am not a Restricted Person.

risk.title: Extended Risk Disclosure
risk.warning: Read this document carefully before using SuiLoop. By deploying a Vault or executing any on-chain strategy, you acknowledge you have read, understood, and accepted all risks described herein.
risk.criticalBody: DeFi is highly experimental. Only interact with SuiLoop using funds you can afford to lose entirely. SuiLoop is software infrastructure, not a financial product. No entity — including SuiLoop operators — can recover funds lost due to smart contract failures, market volatility, or user error. Transactions on Sui are irreversible.

plugins.title: LOOP PLUGINS
plugins.subtitle: Upgrade your agents with advanced cognitive capabilities. From atomic DeFi execution and Walrus forensic logging to social intelligence and MEV capture.
plugins.verifiedModulesDesc: These plugins are developed and maintained by the SuiLoop Core team. They run in a secure sandbox with restricted permissions and are audited for safety. Unlike community skills, these have direct access to optimized native bindings.

sui-deep-research.name: Sui Deep Research
sui-deep-research.description: Autonomous web scraping and analysis engine. Reads whitepapers, news, and protocol docs to inform decisions.

social-sentiment.name: Social Sentiment
social-sentiment.description: Listen to the pulse of the market. Monitors Twitter/X for bullish/bearish trends and social volume spikes.

knowledge-graph.name: Knowledge Graph
knowledge-graph.description: Universal search engine and context builder. Understands 'why' the market is moving by querying real-world data.

flash-loan-engine.name: Flash Loan Engine
flash-loan-engine.description: Executes zero-collateral flash loans via DeepBook V3 in a single atomic transaction. Arbitrage, liquidation, and refinancing in one block.

onchain-oracle.name: On-Chain Oracle
onchain-oracle.description: Pulls real-time price feeds from Pyth Network and Switchboard. Verifies data on-chain before any execution to prevent stale-price exploits.

whale-tracker.name: Whale Tracker
whale-tracker.description: Monitors large wallet movements across the Sui ecosystem. Detects accumulation and distribution patterns before they hit the market.

risk-shield.name: Risk Shield
risk-shield.description: Applies Kelly Criterion and VaR models to protect your capital. Halts strategies automatically when drawdown thresholds are breached.

auto-compounder.name: Auto-Compounder
auto-compounder.description: Automatically harvests and reinvests yield from Scallop and Cetus positions. Maximizes APY without manual intervention, 24/7.

portfolio-rebalancer.name: Portfolio Rebalancer
portfolio-rebalancer.description: Maintains target allocations across your DeFi positions. Triggers rebalancing when drift exceeds defined thresholds using atomic swaps.

mev-interceptor.name: MEV Interceptor
mev-interceptor.description: Detects and front-runs MEV opportunities in the Sui mempool. Captures value from arbitrage windows before they close.

liquidity-sniper.name: Liquidity Sniper
liquidity-sniper.description: Monitors new pool launches on Cetus and Turbos. Automatically deploys capital in the first blocks after launch to capture early liquidity rewards.

walrus-blackbox.name: Walrus Blackbox
walrus-blackbox.description: Immutable decentralized forensic logging via Sui Walrus. Every trade, decision, and anomaly is cryptographically sealed and stored on-chain. Tamper-proof audit trail for full transparency.

usdc-vault-manager.name: USDC Vault Manager
usdc-vault-manager.description: Full lifecycle management for USDC vaults on SuiLoop. Handles deposit, withdrawal, yield routing, and auto-rotation across Navi and Scallop USDC lending pools.

reputation-engine.name: Neural Reputation
reputation-engine.description: Links your agent to the Neural Registry. Earn ELO points through successful trades and build on-chain credibility. Unlocks higher flash loan limits.

security.title: Institutional Security
security.description: All agent interactions are secured by Move guarantees (OwnerCap) and signed nonces. Transactions are atomically executed in a single PTB. Forensic logs are permanently stored on Walrus decentralized storage for both SUI and USDC vaults.

docs.title: DOCUMENTATION
docs.subtitle: Field Manual for Autonomous Financial Operations on the Sui Network.

summary.title: Executive Summary
summary.p1: SuiLoop is an institutional-grade DeFi protocol on the Sui blockchain that integrates atomic leverage execution with autonomous AI agents.
summary.p2: The protocol leverages Move 2024's linear type system (Hot Potato Pattern) to guarantee flash loan repayment at the compiler level, while ElizaOS powers intelligent off-chain agents that analyze market conditions and orchestrate transactions via Programmable Transaction Blocks (PTB).

automation.title: Progressive Automation
automation.subtitle: SuiLoop solves the biggest AI-Crypto dilemma: Security vs. Autonomy

builder.title: Visual Strategy Builder
builder.desc: Drag-and-drop node editor for custom strategies

marketplace.title: Strategy Marketplace
marketplace.desc: 25+ pre-built strategies. SUI & USDC asset selector on each card.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Command Center
dashboard.desc: Real-time metrics, Active Fleet, execution logs

vaults.title: Multi-Asset Vaults
vaults.desc: Deploy SUI or USDC vaults — per-strategy asset selection

storage.title: Walrus & Supabase
storage.desc: Hybrid decentralized storage for forensic logs

b2c.title: B2C / Retail
b2c.desc: Pro-tier subscriptions for access to premium AI models (OpenAI o1) and advanced strategy templates.
b2c.label: Deployment Fee

b2b.title: B2B / Institutional
b2b.desc: Full API access with guaranteed SLAs for industrial-scale backend deployments and custom vault management.
b2b.label: Infrastructure

dev.title: Developer Ecosystem
dev.desc: Micro protocol fees on strategies sold/rented within the Neural Marketplace, supporting the Walrus audit trail.
dev.label: P2P Signal Fee

ideas.title: What to Build?
ideas.subtitle: SuiLoop provides the financial rails. You build the vehicles.
ideas.subtitle2: Here are some "Request for Startups" using our SDK.

portfolio.title: PortfolioGuard Bot
portfolio.desc: A Telegram bot that monitors user portfolios 24/7. If collateral health drops below 1.1, it automatically borrows stablecoins via SuiLoop to repay debt and prevent liquidation.

arb.title: ArbSwarm DAO
arb.desc: A DAO where users pool SUI. Thousands of micro-agents scan DEXs for 0.5% discrepancies and execute atomic flash loans. Profits are split 80/20 between Agent and DAO.

news.title: NewsTrader Oracle
news.desc: Connect standard Web2 news APIs (Bloomberg, Twitter) to Sui. When "Regulatory Approval" is detected, buy the related token via SuiLoop Swaps instantly.

gamefi.title: GameFi NPC Economy
gamefi.desc: Fully autonomous NPCs in a Sui game that manage their own inventory shops. They buy items low from players and sell high, managing their own capital via SuiLoop.

yield.title: USDC Yield Maximizer
yield.desc: Deploy USDC into a SuiLoop vault, then use the agent to auto-rotate capital between Scallop, Navi, and Cetus — always chasing the highest lending rate.

sniper.title: Liquidation Sniper Bot
sniper.desc: Monitor every undercollateralized position on Navi and Scallop. The moment health factor drops below 1.0, flash-loan the repayment from SuiLoop and claim the liquidation bonus.

payroll.title: Onchain Payroll Protocol
payroll.desc: A DAO treasury deploys USDC into a SuiLoop vault. The yield generated weekly is automatically streamed as payroll to contributors' wallets on a schedule.

insurance.title: On-Chain Insurance Fund
insurance.desc: Users pay a small USDC premium weekly. The pool sits in a SuiLoop vault generating yield. When a covered protocol is exploited, the agent autonomously pays out claims.

social.title: Eliza Social Sentiment Trader
social.desc: An ElizaOS agent scans X/Twitter, Telegram, and Discord 24/7 for Sui ecosystem project mentions. When a verified influencer posts bullish content, the agent opens a position.

transparency.title: Proof-of-Transparency Hedge Fund
transparency.desc: A fund where every trade decision is signed by the agent and uploaded immutably to Walrus. Zero black boxes — full cryptographic accountability.

contracts.title: On-Chain Kernel (Sui Move)
contracts.subtitle: The protocol's safety is guaranteed by Move's linear type system and the Hot Potato pattern.

agent.title: Autonomous Units (ElizaOS)
agent.subtitle: The off-chain brain that orchestrates complex transactions.

builder.title: Strategy Architect (Visual Builder)
builder.subtitle: Build complex financial strategies without writing a single line of Move code.
builder.dragDrop: Drag-and-drop nodes to create logical connections.

frontend.title: Command Interface (Next.js)
frontend.subtitle: Glass & Neon dashboard for real-time fleet management.

api.title: Agents API & CLI
api.subtitle: Control your fleet programmatically via our REST API and Command Line Interface.

auth.title: API & SDK Authentication
auth.desc: All API and SDK requests require a Secret Key in the Authorization header. You can generate these keys in the Agents Console.

sdk.title: Official TypeScript SDK
sdk.desc: Build directly on top of SuiLoop using our type-safe SDK.

cli.title: Command Line Interface
cli.desc: Control your agent from the terminal using natural language commands.

mcp.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
mcp.subtitle: Connect SuiLoop to Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible AI.

tools.title: Available Tools
tools.desc: The MCP server exposes the agent's core capabilities to your IDE.

companion.title: Native Desktop App
companion.subtitle: Cross-platform interface built with Tauri for low-latency fleet management.

security.title: Defense Protocols
security.subtitle: Protecting user capital with multiple layers of cryptographic and logical barriers.

hotPotato.title: Hot Potato Enforcement
hotPotato.desc: The flash loan 'Receipt' object has no 'drop' or 'store' abilities, making it impossible to finalize a transaction without repaying the loan.

attack.title: Attack Prevention
attack.desc: Reentrancy protection and slippage checks are built into every execution block.

hero.subtitle: Real-time reputation ranking of autonomous agents operating on the SuiLoop Protocol. Metrics are verified via cryptographical proof on Sui Testnet.

settings.keyRequired: API Key is required for Cloud AI.

settings.info: Keys are stored locally in your browser. They are explicitly routed to your operational agent when dispatching blockchain tasks.
